ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the log file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the log entry */,
  "log_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log level */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system or application generating the log */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., process, thread) */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "log_component" TEXT /* Component related to the log (e.g., database, network) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_log_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_level_id") REFERENCES log_levels ("log_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES log_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the log file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the log file in MB */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the log file was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the log file was last modified */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system or application generating the log file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the log file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression algorithm used for the log file (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  "file_encryption" TEXT /* Encryption algorithm used for the log file (e.g., AES, SSL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_levels" (
  "log_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log level */,
  "log_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the log level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log level */,
  "log_level_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the log level (e.g., green, red, yellow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system or application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system or application */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of system (e.g., server, client, network device) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the system */,
  "hardware_info" TEXT /* Hardware information of the system (e.g., CPU, memory, disk space) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the tag (e.g., blue, orange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_tag_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  "mapping_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_tag_mappings_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_tag_mappings_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES log_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_attributes_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of the search */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Time of the search */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the log entry in the search results */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_search_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_id") REFERENCES log_searches ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  "alert_type_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the alert type (e.g., red, yellow, green) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user resolving the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_resolutions_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES log_alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_resolutions_resolution_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "log_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first log entry */,
  "log_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second log entry */,
  "correlation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correlation type */,
  "correlation_strength" REAL /* Strength of the correlation (e.g., 0.5, 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_correlations_correlation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_type_id") REFERENCES correlation_types ("correlation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_correlations_log_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("log_id_1") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_correlations_log_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("log_id_2") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_types" (
  "correlation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation type */,
  "correlation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the correlation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation type */,
  "correlation_type_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the correlation type (e.g., blue, orange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_retention_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data retention policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the data retention policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data retention policy */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Retention period in days */,
  "archival_period" INTEGER /* Archival period in days */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_retention" (
  "retention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log file */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data retention policy */,
  "retention_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the retention period */,
  "retention_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the retention period */,
  "archival_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the archival period */,
  "archival_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the archival period */,
  "retention_status" TEXT /* Status of the retention (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES log_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES data_retention_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time the action was performed */,
  "action_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was generated */,
  "analytics_time" TEXT /* Time the analytics data was generated */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Analytics data (e.g., charts, graphs, tables) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_analytics_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)
